 Options View Legend Legend
Racenet Form Abbreviations
Legend
  • t = Won @ track
  • d = Won @ distance
  • HT = Home Track
  • o = Last or not in first nine last start
  • s = Won on soft
  • h = Won on heavy
  • n = Won at night
  • b = Beaten favourite latest run
  • (G) = Gelded
  • D/A = Dual Acceptors
Last 10 Results
  • x = Spell
  • F = Failed to finish
  • L = Lost rider
Abbreviations For Video Comments
  • App = approaching
  • H/Out = Hung Out
  • MF = midfield
  • S/A = slow away
  • TAL = tearaway leader
  • WB = well back
  • COT = Change of tactics
  • H/S = Hampered Start
  • MSG = Made some ground
  • SG = saved ground
  • t'out = throughout
  • Wd = weakened
  • DRO = didn't run on
  • J awk = Jumped awkwardly
  • NC = no cover
  • U/p = Under Pressure
  • tt = to turn
  • WPFT = Winning post first time
  • DGO = didn't go on
  • k-up = knocked up
  • O/L = outside lead
  • S/L = shared lead
  • u/u = used up
  • D/N = did nothing
  • L = lengths
  • O/R = over-raced
  • Strt = straight
  • WTMF = worse than midfield
  • H/In = Hung In
  • Lpos = lost position
  • ROS = Ran strongly in straight
  • t = turn
  • W = wide
  • WNC = wide no cover
Abbreviations for Pace of race
  • OPF = On Pace Favoured
  • BMF = Backmarkers favoured
  • F = Fair
Abbreviations for Track Analysis
  • TF = Track fair
  • BGW = Best going out wide
  • BGI = Best going inside
Print

R1 Channel 9 Carbine Club Stakes

1600m
Class: Group 3, 3-Y-O, SW + P
Resulted
Tips & Race Analysis

Analysis

PANOVA chased strongly to win last start to break maiden at Randwick and from a good stable, hard to go past. CALL DA VINCI amongst the placegetters last start running second at Caulfield when first up and faces a rise in distance, don't treat lightly. WEST OF SWINDON won once this prep at Moonee Valley two runs back and gets the winkers on for the first time, dangerous. REGAL AWARD led throughout for a dominant win last start at Caulfield and in strong form with two wins from four attempts this campaign at metro level, don't dismiss.

Selections

  • 9. Panova (6) $4.60
  • 4. Call Da Vinci (7) $8.50
  • 2. West Of Swindon (4) $6.50
  • 5. Regal Award (2) $2.00
